## Architecture Decision Proposal

> **Note:** All architectural decisions must follow the Gaxera Constitution's "Three-Question Filter" (Intellectually interesting? Can it be implemented? Should it be implemented?).
> See `docs/adr/TEMPLATE.md` for the full context structure.

## Context and Problem Statement
<!-- Describe the context and problem statement, e.g., in free form using two to three sentences. You may want to articulate the problem in form of a question. -->

## Decision Drivers
<!-- What forces drive this decision? (e.g. constraints, performance, capabilities) -->
* [driver 1, e.g., a force, facing concern, ...]
* [driver 2, e.g., a force, facing concern, ...]

## Considered Options

* [option 1]
* [option 2]
* [option 3]

## Proposed Decision
<!-- What is your recommended option and why? -->

## Consequences
<!-- What becomes easier or more difficult if this is accepted? -->

### Positive Consequences

* [e.g., improved isolation...]

### Negative Consequences

* [e.g., increased IPC overhead...]
